languages.text: {n}Уголок рта Тервантьяса дергается, а тон голоса резко опускается на октаву, превращаясь в низкое угрожающее шипение.{/n} "Ты возомнил{mf||а}, что можешь решать за меня, образец? Еще раз вмешаешься, и я сращу твои губы с веками".

{n}Tervantias's lip twitches, and his voice sharply drops an octave, becoming a low, menacing hiss.{/n} "You presume to make choices for me, specimen? Meddle again, and I will graft your lips to your eyelids."
languages.original_text: {n}Уголок рта Тервантьяса дергается, а тон голоса резко опускается на октаву, превращаясь в низкое угрожающее шипение.{/n} "Ты возомнил{mf||а}, что можешь решать за меня, образец? Еще раз вмешаешься, и я сращу твои губы с веками".

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias's lip twitches, and his voice drops a sharp octave, falling into a low, menacing hiss.{/n} "You presume to make choices for me, specimen? Meddle again, and I will graft your lips to your eyelids."

{n}Tervantias's lip twitches, and his voice sharply drops an octave, becoming a low, menacing hiss.{/n} "You presume to make choices for me, specimen? Meddle again, and I will graft your lips to your eyelids."

languages.text: {n}Tervantias' Lippen zucken, als er seine Stimme um eine Oktave zu einem bedrohlichen Zischen senkt.{/n} "Ihr wagt es, mir Vorschläge zu machen? Versucht das noch einmal, und ich transplantiere Eure Lippen auf Eure Augenlider."
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lip twitches, and his voice sharply drops an octave, becoming a low, menacing hiss.{/n} "You presume to make choices for me, specimen? Meddle again, and I will graft your lips to your eyelids."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias' Lippen zucken, als er seine Stimme um eine Oktave zu einem bedrohlichen Zischen senkt.{/n} "Ihr wagt es, mir Vorschläge zu machen? Versucht das noch einmal, und ich transplantiere Eure Lippen auf Eure Augenlider."

languages.text: {n}Tervantias plisse les yeux et sa voix se fait soudainement plus caverneuse et menaçante.{/n} « Vous pensez pouvoir décider à ma place, spécimen ? Ouvrez encore une fois la bouche et je suturerai vos lèvres à vos paupières. »
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lip twitches, and his voice sharply drops an octave, becoming a low, menacing hiss.{/n} "You presume to make choices for me, specimen? Meddle again, and I will graft your lips to your eyelids."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias plisse les yeux et sa voix se fait soudainement plus caverneuse et menaçante.{/n} « Vous pensez pouvoir décider à ma place, spécimen ? Ouvrez encore une fois la bouche et je suturerai vos lèvres à vos paupières. »

languages.text: {n}Tervantias tuerce el gesto y su voz baja una octava, convirtiéndose en un siseo amenazador.{/n} «¿Pretendes decidir por mí, espécimen? Vuelve a inmiscuirte y convertiré tus labios en un injerto de párpados».
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lip twitches, and his voice sharply drops an octave, becoming a low, menacing hiss.{/n} "You presume to make choices for me, specimen? Meddle again, and I will graft your lips to your eyelids."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias tuerce el gesto y su voz baja una octava, convirtiéndose en un siseo amenazador.{/n} «¿Pretendes decidir por mí, espécimen? Vuelve a inmiscuirte y convertiré tus labios en un injerto de párpados».

languages.text: {n}Tervantias'ın dudağı seğiriyor. Sesi, keskin bir şekilde bir oktav düşerek alçak, tehditkâr bir tıslamaya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Benim adıma karar verebileceğini mi sanıyorsun numune? Bir daha işime karışırsan dudaklarını göz kapaklarına aşlarım."
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lip twitches, and his voice sharply drops an octave, becoming a low, menacing hiss.{/n} "You presume to make choices for me, specimen? Meddle again, and I will graft your lips to your eyelids."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias'ın dudağı seğiriyor. Sesi, keskin bir şekilde bir oktav düşerek alçak, tehditkâr bir tıslamaya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Benim adıma karar verebileceğini mi sanıyorsun numune? Bir daha işime karışırsan dudaklarını göz kapaklarına aşlarım."

languages.text: {n}特万提亚斯的嘴唇抽搐了一下，声调骤然压低，变成充满威胁的低沉嘶鸣。{/n}“你一个样本，也敢替我做决定？再敢插嘴，我就把你的嘴唇缝到眼皮上。”
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lip twitches, and his voice sharply drops an octave, becoming a low, menacing hiss.{/n} "You presume to make choices for me, specimen? Meddle again, and I will graft your lips to your eyelids."

traits.locale_text: {n}特万提亚斯的嘴唇抽搐了一下，声调骤然压低，变成充满威胁的低沉嘶鸣。{/n}“你一个样本，也敢替我做决定？再敢插嘴，我就把你的嘴唇缝到眼皮上。”

languages.text: {n}テルヴァンティアスの唇がひくつき、その声は鋭く一オクターブ落ちて、低く威嚇的なしゅうという音になる。{/n}「貴様、私のために選択を下すつもりか、標本ごときが？ 今一度しゃしゃり出てみろ、貴様の唇を瞼に縫いつけてやる」
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lip twitches, and his voice sharply drops an octave, becoming a low, menacing hiss.{/n} "You presume to make choices for me, specimen? Meddle again, and I will graft your lips to your eyelids."

traits.locale_text: {n}テルヴァンティアスの唇がひくつき、その声は鋭く一オクターブ落ちて、低く威嚇的なしゅうという音になる。{/n}「貴様、私のために選択を下すつもりか、標本ごときが？ 今一度しゃしゃり出てみろ、貴様の唇を瞼に縫いつけてやる」
